title: semrel core configuration
description: Schema for the .semrel.yaml configuration file used by the semrel release tool.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Set to 1 for semrel v1.x compatibility.

tagPrefix.description: Prefix applied to generated version tags (e.g. 'v' → 'v1.2.3').

branch.description: Release branch. Defaults to the repository default branch.

plugins.description: Ordered list of plugins to run during release.

dryRun.description: If true, run the full release pipeline without creating tags or publishing.
